ddl_snippet: CREATE TABLE CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST_ID INT PRIMARY KEY, FULL_NAME VARCHAR(200), EMAIL VARCHAR(150), REGION_CODE VARCHAR(10))
concept_definition: An individual or organisation that has registered and made at least one purchase.
cypher:
MERGE (bc:BusinessConcept {name: 'Customer'})
ON CREATE SET bc.definition = 'An individual or organisation that has registered and made at least one purchase.',
              bc.provenance_text = 'Business glossary entry: Customer',
              bc.source_doc = 'business_glossary.txt',
              bc.synonyms = ['Client', 'Buyer'],
              bc.confidence_score = 0.97
ON MATCH SET bc.confidence_score = 0.97

MERGE (pt:PhysicalTable {table_name: 'CUSTOMER_MASTER'})
ON CREATE SET pt.schema_name = 'public',
              pt.column_names = ['CUST_ID', 'FULL_NAME', 'EMAIL', 'REGION_CODE'],
              pt.column_types = '{"CUST_ID": "INT", "FULL_NAME": "VARCHAR(200)", "EMAIL": "VARCHAR(150)", "REGION_CODE": "VARCHAR(10)"}',
              pt.ddl_source = 'CREATE TABLE CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST_ID INT PRIMARY KEY, FULL_NAME VARCHAR(200), EMAIL VARCHAR(150), REGION_CODE VARCHAR(10))'

MERGE (bc)-[r:MAPPED_TO]->(pt)
ON CREATE SET r.confidence = 0.97, r.validated_by = 'llm_judge', r.created_at = datetime()
ON MATCH SET r.confidence = 0.97, r.validated_by = 'llm_judge', r.updated_at = datetime()

description: Sales order header mapping with STATUS constraint

description: Junction/line item table with two FK parents

ddl_snippet: CREATE TABLE SYS_AUDIT_LOG (LOG_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, ACTION_TYPE VARCHAR(50), TABLE_NAME VARCHAR(100), CHANGED_BY VARCHAR(100), CHANGED_AT DATETIME)
cypher:
-- No business concept mapping for system table SYS_AUDIT_LOG
MERGE (pt:PhysicalTable {table_name: 'SYS_AUDIT_LOG'})
ON CREATE SET pt.schema_name = 'public',
              pt.column_names = ['LOG_ID', 'ACTION_TYPE', 'TABLE_NAME', 'CHANGED_BY', 'CHANGED_AT'],
              pt.column_types = '{"LOG_ID": "BIGINT", "ACTION_TYPE": "VARCHAR(50)", "TABLE_NAME": "VARCHAR(100)", "CHANGED_BY": "VARCHAR(100)", "CHANGED_AT": "DATETIME"}',
              pt.ddl_source = 'CREATE TABLE SYS_AUDIT_LOG (LOG_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, ACTION_TYPE VARCHAR(50), TABLE_NAME VARCHAR(100), CHANGED_BY VARCHAR(100), CHANGED_AT DATETIME)',
              pt.unmapped = true,
              pt.unmapped_reason = 'System/technical table with no business concept counterpart'

ddl_snippet: CREATE TABLE TB_CATEGORY (CATEGORY_ID INT PRIMARY KEY, CATEGORY_NAME VARCHAR(200), PARENT_CATEGORY_ID INT REFERENCES TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID))
concept_definition: A hierarchical classification grouping related Products. Categories can have parent Categories.
cypher:
MERGE (bc:BusinessConcept {name: 'Category'})
ON CREATE SET bc.definition = 'A hierarchical classification grouping related Products. Categories can have parent Categories.',
              bc.provenance_text = 'Business glossary entry: Category',
              bc.source_doc = 'business_glossary.txt',
              bc.synonyms = ['Product Group', 'Classification'],
              bc.confidence_score = 0.88
ON MATCH SET bc.confidence_score = 0.88

MERGE (pt:PhysicalTable {table_name: 'TB_CATEGORY'})
ON CREATE SET pt.schema_name = 'public',
              pt.column_names = ['CATEGORY_ID', 'CATEGORY_NAME', 'PARENT_CATEGORY_ID'],
              pt.column_types = '{"CATEGORY_ID": "INT", "CATEGORY_NAME": "VARCHAR(200)", "PARENT_CATEGORY_ID": "INT"}',
              pt.ddl_source = 'CREATE TABLE TB_CATEGORY (CATEGORY_ID INT PRIMARY KEY, CATEGORY_NAME VARCHAR(200), PARENT_CATEGORY_ID INT REFERENCES TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID))'

MERGE (bc)-[r:MAPPED_TO]->(pt)
ON CREATE SET r.confidence = 0.88, r.validated_by = 'llm_judge', r.created_at = datetime()
ON MATCH SET r.confidence = 0.88, r.validated_by = 'llm_judge', r.updated_at = datetime()

WITH pt
MERGE (pt)-[:JOINS_WITH {join_column: 'PARENT_CATEGORY_ID', type: 'SELF_REF_FK'}]->(pt)
